ingredients.name: Café Renoir Kichijoji Kitaguchi
ingredients.localName: Cafe Renoir 吉祥寺北口店
ingredients.entityContext: This cafe near Kichijoji Station north exit appears as the real-world setting where Sota Mizushino and Meteora Ostelreich share quiet conversations in episode 2, giving the viewer a first taste of the anime's grounded Tokyo atmosphere.

ingredients.name: JR Shinjuku East Exit Station Square
ingredients.localName: JR新宿駅 東口駅前広場
ingredients.address: 3 Chome-38-1 Shinjuku, Shinjuku City, Tokyo 160-0022, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Shinjuku East Exit plaza is featured in Re:CREATORS' opening sequence, establishing Tokyo's sprawling urban backdrop as the stage where fictional characters and the real world begin to collide.

ingredients.name: Shakujii Park
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-26-1 Shakujiidai, Nerima City, Tokyo 177-0045, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Shakujii Park appears in the opening imagery of Re:CREATORS, its tranquil lakeside scenery contrasting with the high-stakes conflict that unfolds as Created Beings invade the real world.

ingredients.name: SHOGAKUKAN Inc.
ingredients.address: SHOGAKUKAN Inc., 小学館ビル 2 Chome-3-1 Hitotsubashi, Chiyoda City, Tokyo 101-0003, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Shogakukan building in Hitotsubashi is visible in the opening sequence, nodding to the manga publishing world that Re:CREATORS uses as its creative backdrop where stories and their characters are born.

ingredients.name: Kiyose Station
ingredients.entityContext: Kiyose Station appears in episode 1 as Sota travels by train, establishing the suburban commuter route he uses as an ordinary Tokyo high school student before the Created Beings enter his world.

ingredients.name: Toyota Mobility Tokyo Inokashira
ingredients.localName: トヨタモビリティ東京 井の頭店
ingredients.entityContext: The car dealership near Inokashira in Musashino is glimpsed in episode 1 as part of the Kichijoji neighborhood scenery that defines Sota's everyday home territory.

ingredients.name: Yoyogi Station
ingredients.entityContext: Yoyogi Station is shown in episode 1 as a transit landmark in the Created Beings' early Tokyo traversal, grounding their otherworldly arrival in recognizable commuter infrastructure.

ingredients.name: Lawson Yoyogi Sanchome Shop
ingredients.localName: ローソン 代々木三丁目店

ingredients.name: Yoyogi Park
ingredients.entityContext: Yoyogi Park's open green expanse appears in episode 1 as the Created Beings move through central Tokyo, its familiar public space underscoring the jarring reality of fictional characters walking among real people.

ingredients.name: FamilyMart Kichijoji Koen-dori store
ingredients.localName: ファミリーマート 吉祥寺公園通り店

ingredients.name: McDonald's Kichijoji
ingredients.localName: マクドナルド 吉祥寺店

ingredients.name: Nogata Seika Kichijoji Main Store
ingredients.localName: 中野八百秀 吉祥寺本店

ingredients.name: UNIQLO Kichijoji Store
ingredients.localName: ユニクロ 吉祥寺店

ingredients.name: NPC 24 H Kichijoji Honcho 2-chome Parking Lot
ingredients.localName: NPC24H吉祥寺本町２丁目パーキング

ingredients.name: Inokashira Park Zoo
ingredients.entityContext: The zoo within Inokashira Park is shown in episode 2 as Sota and Meteora walk through the Kichijoji area, a mundane outing that highlights the surreal everyday life Sota tries to maintain amid the crisis.

ingredients.name: Elephant House
ingredients.localName: ゾウ舎(井の頭自然文化園)

ingredients.name: Inokashira Benzaiten
ingredients.localName: 井の頭弁財天 大盛寺
ingredients.entityContext: The Benzaiten shrine on the island in Inokashira Park features in episode 2 during Sota and Meteora's walk, a culturally resonant local landmark in the heart of the Kichijoji district central to the show.

ingredients.name: Inokashira Park
ingredients.entityContext: Inokashira Park near Sota's Kichijoji neighborhood appears in episode 2 during quieter character moments, its pond and tree-lined paths forming the peaceful backdrop to early conversations between Sota and the materialized characters.

ingredients.name: SUNSHINE 60 OBSERVATORY TENBOU-PARK
ingredients.localName: サンシャイン60展望台 てんぼうパーク
ingredients.entityContext: Sunshine 60 in Ikebukuro appears in episode 2 as one of Tokyo's recognizable skyline towers, its height and urban density used to convey the scale of the city where the Created Beings' conflict is playing out.

ingredients.name: FamilyMart Sunshine West Store
ingredients.localName: ファミリーマート サンシャイン西店

ingredients.name: Sunshine City
ingredients.entityContext: Sunshine City's massive shopping complex in Ikebukuro appears in episode 2 as a busy commercial landmark, part of Re:CREATORS' thorough documentation of Tokyo's distinct neighborhoods.

ingredients.name: Shibuyaburijjini Bridge
ingredients.localName: 渋谷歩道橋(ブリッジ渋谷21)
ingredients.entityContext: The Shibuya pedestrian bridge appears in episode 4 during a tense encounter involving the Created Beings, its elevated vantage point over the busy Shibuya area lending a dramatic framing to the scene.

ingredients.name: Tateishi Station Street Shopping Street
ingredients.entityContext: The Tateishi shotengai in Katsushika appears in episode 6 as a gritty, retro Tokyo shopping street, its narrow lanes and local shops providing atmospheric contrast to the high-concept battles unfolding elsewhere in the city.

ingredients.name: Lawson Tateishi 1-chome
ingredients.localName: ローソン 立石一丁目店

ingredients.name: SOCCER SHOP KAMO Harajuku
ingredients.localName: サッカーショップKAMO 原宿店

ingredients.name: Akihabara UDX
ingredients.entityContext: Akihabara UDX appears in episode 8 as the otaku culture hub at the center of the Re:CREATORS world, where anime and game characters would feel most at home and where the show's meta-narrative about fiction and reality resonates most strongly.

ingredients.name: HEY (Hirose Entertainment Yard) Taito
ingredients.entityContext: The HEY arcade in Akihabara appears in episode 8, its floors of arcade cabinets serving as an apt setting for a series where game characters have crossed into the real world.

ingredients.name: Yarou Sushi
ingredients.localName: 野郎寿司 新宿本店

ingredients.name: Shinjuku walkway park
ingredients.localName: 新宿遊歩道公園 ～四季の路～

ingredients.name: FREAK ' S STORE Rarapototachikawatachihiten
ingredients.localName: FREAK'S STORE ららぽーと立川立飛店

ingredients.name: LaLaport Tachikawa Tachihi
ingredients.entityContext: LaLaport Tachikawa Tachihi's large suburban mall appears in episode 9 as the backdrop for character shopping scenes, its modern retail environment contrasting with the escalating chaos of the Created Beings' conflict.

ingredients.name: TOHO CINEMAS Tachikawa Tachihi
ingredients.localName: TOHOシネマズ 立川立飛
ingredients.entityContext: The Toho Cinemas at Tachikawa is shown in episode 10, a theater complex that resonates with Re:CREATORS' core theme of storytelling and the media industry as characters literally walk out of their fictional worlds.

ingredients.name: Kaihimmakuhari Station
ingredients.entityContext: Kaihimmakuhari Station in Chiba appears in episode 11 as the gateway to the Makuhari convention area, a fitting location for a show steeped in anime convention and pop-culture industry culture.

ingredients.name: Kichijoji Station
ingredients.entityContext: Kichijoji Station is the transit anchor of protagonist Sota Mizushino's neighborhood and appears in episode 12, the familiar commuter hub that represents the ordinary Tokyo life he is struggling to hold onto as Created Beings reshape his reality.

ingredients.name: Sony Showroom/Sony Store Ginza
ingredients.localName: ソニーストア 銀座

ingredients.name: Daily Yamazaki Yokohama Kozukuecho store
ingredients.localName: デイリーヤマザキ 横浜小机町店

ingredients.name: Nissan Stadium
ingredients.entityContext: Nissan Stadium in Yokohama appears in episode 16, its massive scale evoking the grand arena-like confrontations between Created Beings and the Governmental Policymakers tasked with managing the crisis.

ingredients.name: CACHETTE965
ingredients.localName: フレンチ CACHETTE965（カシェットクロコ）銀座

ingredients.name: Ginza Pedestrian Paradise
ingredients.entityContext: The Ginza pedestrian promenade appears in episode 17 as a glamorous public space, its luxury-shopping street atmosphere used to frame scenes involving high-stakes negotiations among the characters who control the fate of the Created Beings.

ingredients.name: Courtyard Tokyo Ginza Hotel
ingredients.localName: コートヤード・マリオット銀座東武ホテル

ingredients.name: Mitsukoshi Ginza
ingredients.entityContext: Mitsukoshi Ginza's iconic department store facade features in episode 18 during Ginza-set scenes, part of the show's careful recreation of upscale Tokyo as the backdrop for its behind-the-scenes industry drama.

ingredients.name: FamilyMart Ginza Chuo Dori Store
ingredients.localName: ファミリーマート 銀座中央通り店

ingredients.name: Naniwa
ingredients.localName: お好み焼き鉄板焼 浪花

ingredients.name: Odaiba Marine Park
ingredients.entityContext: Odaiba Marine Park serves as a key outdoor setting in episode 22, its waterfront with views of Rainbow Bridge and the Tokyo skyline providing the sweeping backdrop for one of the show's climactic confrontations.

ingredients.name: Starbucks Coffee - Nakano-dori Avenue
ingredients.localName: スターバックス コーヒー 中野通り店
